name: Kitz
description: AI-native Business Management System for small business owners (creators & local vendors) in Panama. Solves lead/follow-up chaos, order/fulfillment management, and financial clarity.
target_users: Anyone selling through WhatsApp or social media

storefronts.description: Create shareable product pages with title, description, price, images, and multiple payment options. Customers can view, order, and pay via shared links.

payments.description: Accept payments through Panama's most popular methods.

orders.description: Full order lifecycle management with cost tracking and margin analysis.

crm.description: Customer relationship management with lifecycle tracking and follow-ups.

ai_agent_commander.description: Omnichannel AI agent orchestration hub for WhatsApp, Email, and Voice. Hybrid autonomy mode with human-in-the-loop approval.

ai_tools.description: AI-powered business tools gated by AI Battery (credit system).

consultant_crm.description: Kanban-style contact pipeline for consultants and service providers.

productivity.description: Built-in productivity tools for business owners.

insights.description: Financial clarity dashboard for revenue, costs, and margins.

notifications.description: Real-time notification system for orders, follow-ups, and agent actions.

ai_battery.description: Credit-based AI usage system. Users have a balance that depletes with AI actions and recharges over time.
ai_battery.gating: All AI features require sufficient credits. UI shows battery indicator and recharge modal.

tech_stack.frontend: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Vite + shadcn/ui
tech_stack.backend: Lovable Cloud (database, auth, edge functions, storage)
